name: vscode-operator
description: AI that operates VS Code like a real developer through Language Model Tools and a local MCP bridge.

commands.title: VSCode Operator: Show MCP Bridge Status

vscodeOperator.mcpBridge.enabled.description: Enable the local MCP bridge that exposes VS Code language model tools to external MCP clients.

vscodeOperator.mcpBridge.host.description: Host interface for the local MCP bridge. Keep this on 127.0.0.1 unless you intentionally want remote access.

vscodeOperator.mcpBridge.port.description: TCP port for the MCP proxy (the fixed port that MCP clients connect to). Individual bridge instances bind to port+1, port+2, etc.

vscodeOperator.mcpBridge.path.description: HTTP path for the MCP endpoint exposed by the local bridge.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_readProblems
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this tool BEFORE attempting any fix, refactor, or code-quality task. It returns all diagnostics from the VS Code Problems panel (errors, warnings, hints) with file path, severity, message, source, code, and precise line/column range. Always read problems first when the user reports build errors, type errors, lint issues, or asks you to fix the codebase.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read the current VS Code Problems panel diagnostics.

maxItems.description: Maximum number of diagnostics to return

minSeverity.description: Minimum severity level to include. Default is warning (returns warning + error).

pathGlob.description: Optional glob filter for file paths. Supports absolute and workspace-relative globs. Accepts a single string, a comma-separated string, or an array of strings. Prefix a pattern with ! to exclude matches.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_activeEditorSummary
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this tool to get the currently active file path, language id, and cursor position from VS Code. This tool takes no input fields.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_hoverTopVisible
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this tool to query hover/type information at the top currently visible position in the active editor. This tool takes no input fields.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get hover info at top visible position.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_hoverAtPosition
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this tool to get hover/type information at a specific position in the active editor. You can optionally specify a workspacePath to query a specific workspace when multiple VS Code instances are connected.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get hover info at a specific line/column.

workspacePath.description: Optional: absolute file system path to the workspace. If not provided, uses the active editor's workspace.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_completionAt
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this tool to get LSP completion candidates at a specific line/column. By default it uses the active editor, or you can pass filePath to query a specific file. You can optionally specify workspacePath to route to a specific workspace when multiple VS Code instances are connected.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get completions at a specific line/column.

workspacePath.description: Optional: absolute file system path to the workspace. If not provided, uses the active editor's workspace.

filePath.description: Optional: target file for completion. Supports absolute path, or relative path resolved from workspacePath/current workspace.

triggerCharacter.description: Optional trigger character for completion (e.g. ":" for Lua method call, "." for property access)

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_executeCommand
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call this tool to execute any VS Code command by its command id when no specialized tool covers the need. Examples: open a file (vscode.open), show a definition (vscode.executeDefinitionProvider), trigger a code action (editor.action.quickFix), or inspect symbol references. Pass arguments as the args array or as argsJson (JSON-encoded array string). The tool returns the command result as text. Prefer specialized tools such as vscodeOperator_hoverAtPosition and vscodeOperator_completionAt when available.

argsJson.description: Alternative JSON string for args, must decode to an array

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugStart
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Start a VS Code debug session by launch config name or inline debug configuration.

workspacePath.description: Optional workspace path to start debugging in

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugSetBreakpoints
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Set source breakpoints for a file by 1-based line numbers.

filePath.description: Absolute file path, or path relative to workspacePath/current workspace

workspacePath.description: Optional workspace path used to resolve relative filePath

clearExistingInFile.description: Remove existing source breakpoints in this file before adding new ones

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugControl
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Control execution flow of an active debug session (continue/step/pause/restart/stop).

threadId.description: Optional thread id for continue/step/pause actions

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugClearBreakpoints
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Clear breakpoints globally or clear source breakpoints for a specific file.

filePath.description: Optional file path for file-scoped clear (absolute or relative to workspacePath/current workspace)

workspacePath.description: Optional workspace path for resolving relative filePath

all.description: Set true to clear all breakpoints

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugGetThreads
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read thread list from the active debug session.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugGetTopFrame
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the top stack frame of a debug thread, useful for quickly finding current paused location.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get top frame of current thread.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugSnapshot
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a compact one-shot debug snapshot: top frame, scopes, variables, and optional expression evaluations.

maxScopes.description: Maximum number of scopes to fetch, default 3

maxVariablesPerScope.description: Maximum variables to fetch per scope, default 50

evaluateExpressions.description: Optional expressions to evaluate in current frame

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugGetStackTrace
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read stack trace from a debug thread.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugGetScopes
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read scopes for a stack frame.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugGetVariables
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read variables from a scope/variable reference.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugEvaluate
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Evaluate an expression in debug context.

languageModelTools.name: vscodeOperator_debugStatus
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get current debug sessions, breakpoint summary, and thread preview.
